creator: ron@maxitec.co.za
text:
ipfw pipe for localhost causes machine to hang.

How-To-Repeat: I executed the following ipfw commands

ipfw add prob 1 pipe 1 tcp from 127.0.0.1 to any in
ipfw pipe 1 config bw 100MByte/s

Then I "telnet localhost 25" which causes the machine to hang.  Not even CTRL-ALT-DELETE works.  I have to do a hard reset to reboot the machine.  All network connections to the machine is also lost.
